Scaffolded Vite vanilla JS project with Three.js. All acceptance criteria met: package.json has three in deps and vite in devDeps, index.html has canvas#three-canvas and div#app, vite.config.js sets port 5173, main.js imports THREE and logs REVISION, npm run build produces dist/ successfully.
Fixed main.js log format to use 'Three.js r' + THREE.REVISION per AC#5; build passes
Added CORSMiddleware to FastAPI app reading ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var, defaulting to http://localhost:5173. Tests in test/test_cors_middleware.py pass; full suite 726 tests passed.

Added ALLOWED_ORIGINS wildcard guard in main.py (raises ValueError if '*' present with allow_credentials=True). Fixed test assertions: allow_credentials header, None check for disallowed origin. Added multi-origin parsing test and wildcard guard test.
All 3 commits landed: frontend scaffold, CORS middleware+tests, cycle review docs. 728 tests pass.
Implemented frontend/src/api/client.js with all 10 required async functions. Build passes. Committed as 66fc71f.
Fixed 5 broken API client functions: fetchPlayerStats, fetchGameStats, fetchLeaderboard, updateHolecards, updateCommunityCards — correct routes, methods, and parameters. Build passes.

Created frontend/src/scenes/table.js with initScene(canvasElement): WebGLRenderer, PerspectiveCamera at (0,8,5), ambient + directional lighting, resize handler, RAF loop. Build passes. Commit 47344de.
Stored RAF handle in rafId, added dispose() that calls cancelAnimationFrame + removeEventListener. Build passes.
Implemented hash-based SPA router and nav bar; build passes, committed b4e812c
Added style.css import to main.js and nav a.active rule to style.css; build passes
Implemented tableGeometry.js with addPokerTable, computeSeatPositions, createSeatLabels, updateSeatLabelPositions, and loadSession. Build passes with 0 errors.
Added behind-camera guard (projected.z > 1) in updateSeatLabelPositions; hides label instead of rendering at mirrored position. Build passes.
Created frontend/src/views/playbackView.js with session list panel and loading flow. Build passes, committed as 995fbf2.
AC5 implemented (initScene, loadSession, updateSeatLabelPositions wired); XSS fixed in error catch and session row; player count uses s.player_count
Called onResize() before return in initScene; wrapped scene setup in requestAnimationFrame in playbackView.js. Build passes.
createCard factory implemented: BoxGeometry(0.7,1.0,0.02), canvas-rendered face (256x384px) with rank/suit, dark-blue back, flip() 0.3s Y-axis tween. Build passes 0 errors.
Session scrubber component created at frontend/src/components/sessionScrubber.js. Vite build passes. Committed as 84238e7.
Added updateLabel() call before return in createSessionScrubber to fire onChange with initial hand index on construction
Street scrubber component implemented in frontend/src/components/streetScrubber.js. Build passes. Committed eaaa2f0.
Fixed: spread assignment prevents caller mutation, fallback walk-back when active street becomes disabled, swapped initial updateUI/onStreetChange order
Implemented createChipStack and createChipStacks with lerp animation, P/L height scaling, negative red tint, and null neutral stacks. Build passes.
Imported createChipStacks, called after computeSeatPositions, updateChipStacks called in __onSessionLoaded. Build passes.
Implemented createCommunityCards with goToStreet/dispose. Flop animates 3 cards, Turn/River each add 1. Backwards scrubbing reverse-animates off table. Build passes.
inflightRemovals Set tracks in-flight removal meshes; dispose() drains and disposes them. No orphaned scene meshes.
animateCard returns cancel closure with cancelled flag; cancelHandles stored per slot; both addCard and removeCard cancel prior handle before starting new animation. No competing RAF loops.

Implemented createHoleCards with initHand, goToShowdown, goToPreFlop, dispose. All 5 ACs met: face-down pre-flop cards, flip-on-showdown, fold dimming + FOLD sprite, winner glow, null hole_cards left face-down. Build passes.
Fixed inline as part of aia-core-2pg review loop
Fixed inline as part of aia-core-2pg review loop

Fixed inline as part of aia-core-2pg review loop

Implemented createResultOverlay with all 5 ACs: centered overlay div, player table with hole cards/result/P/L, gold winner highlight, dismiss-only button, hidden by default. Build passes.
Implemented createStatsSidebar with cumulative P/L, sorted players (null-last), summary row, textContent-only DOM, dispose(); build passes.
Implemented renderDataView with sortable session table, expandable hand rows, loading/error states, and DOM-safe card formatting. Wired to #/data route in main.js. Build passes.
Stale check added after fetchHands in both success and catch paths of handleRowClick.

Player management UI implemented in frontend/src/components/playerManagement.js. Uses fetchLeaderboard() for player list with total hands count. New Player form with client-side validation, 409 duplicate error handling, and XSS-safe DOM API.
Added fetchPlayers() to client.js (GET /players). playerManagement now shows ALL registered players. AC4 DOM order fixed.
Session creation form implemented. Date picker, player multi-select, POST /games, inline 409 error, form reset. All 5 ACs satisfied.
Wired sessionScrubber onChange to updateChipStacks via computeCumulativePL. Added scrubber-container to HTML layout. Build passes, 1 file changed.
activeScrubber dispose + innerHTML clear moved before zero-hands guard. Both paths now unconditionally clean up.
onSuccess isolated in its own try/catch; PATCH wrapped as non-fatal; POST failure is the only path to outer catch.
Hand recording form implemented. Community card fields, per-player rows, card validation, duplicate detection, POST+PATCH with onSuccess. HIGH bug fixed in aia-core-4b1.
Made result/profit_loss fields read-only; they are not persisted by the backend
Wrapped playerName with encodeURIComponent in updateHolecards and fetchPlayerStats
Hand edit/correction form implemented in handEditForm.js. HIGH findings (rd8, xmq) fixed and verified by Scott. All ACs met.

Created frontend/README.md with prerequisites (Node.js ^20.19.0 or >=22.12.0, npm >=10), installation, dev server, build, environment variables (VITE_API_BASE_URL and ALLOWED_ORIGINS), FastAPI StaticFiles deployment snippet, and plain-language 3D scene explanation. 728 tests pass.
Added warning in frontend/README.md deployment section about @app.get('/') conflict with StaticFiles mount, including corrected main.py snippet showing route removal or relocation to /api/.
Installed preact, configured Vite esbuild JSX for Preact (jsxFactory/jsxFragment/jsxInject), created src/dealer/DealerApp.jsx, build passes
Implemented #/dealer route: added cleanup-aware router, Dealer nav link, Preact mount/unmount in main.js, fixed Vite 8 JSX config with @preact/preset-vite. Build passes.
Added uploadImage and getDetectionResults functions to frontend/src/api/client.js. Build passes.
Implemented GameCreateForm.jsx and wired into DealerApp.jsx. Build passes.
HandDashboard component created and wired into DealerApp step flow. Build passes.
Implemented PlayerGrid component and wired into DealerApp. Build passes.

Implemented dealer state reducer with useReducer. Created dealerState.js with reducer handling SET_GAME, SET_PLAYER_CARDS, SET_COMMUNITY_CARDS, RESET_HAND, SET_STEP. Refactored DealerApp.jsx to use useReducer. 9 unit tests pass, build passes.

T-009 complete: CameraCapture.jsx created with hidden file input, auto-trigger on mount, uploadImage+getDetectionResults flow, loading spinner, error+retry handling. DealerApp.jsx wired to show CameraCapture overlay on tile tap and transition to review step on detection result. Build passes.
Added visible initial state with Cancel button to CameraCapture overlay to prevent Android trap
Implemented DetectionReview.jsx and wired into DealerApp review step

All acceptance criteria already implemented in prior work (T-009). Verified: (1) Table tile triggers CameraCapture, (2) upload/detect flow is identical, (3) DetectionReview receives mode=community with 3-5 card expectations, (4) Table tile shows checkmark after SET_COMMUNITY_CARDS. Build passes.
Implemented CardPicker.jsx and updated DetectionReview.jsx with correction capability. Build passes.
Implemented Submit Hand button with payload assembly, duplicate-card validation, API submission, RESET_HAND dispatch, and error handling. All 15 frontend tests pass, build clean.
Implemented inline player creation in GameCreateForm.jsx: text input + Add button, POST /players on submit, auto-selects new player, 409 duplicate error shown inline. Build passes.
Mobile polish complete: Vite LAN host, 48px tap targets, global box-sizing reset, overflow-x prevention, touch optimizations. Build passes.

Implemented ResultEnum with won/folded/lost values. Updated PlayerHandEntry, PlayerResultEntry, HandResultUpdate to use ResultEnum | None. Updated stats routes and all 14 test files. 768 tests pass, pre-commit clean.
Implemented and tested: HandCreate fields optional, empty-body POST returns 201, backwards compatible, 775 tests pass
Fixed: filter None community cards in add_player_to_hand() before passing to validate_no_duplicate_cards(). 3 regression tests added.
Fixed: filter None community cards in edit_player_hole_cards() before passing to validate_no_duplicate_cards(). Covered by test_none_community_cards_bug.py.
Implemented and tested: PATCH /games/{game_id}/hands/{hand_number}/players/{player_name}/result endpoint. 16 new tests, 794 total passing, 0 regressions.

Added ResultEnum validation in validate_csv_rows() — invalid result strings (including legacy win/loss/fold) are now rejected with descriptive errors before database write. 15 new tests, 809 total passing.
Implemented and tested — equity.py ported from JS evaluator with exhaustive/Monte Carlo logic, 14 tests pass
Fixed: early return guard in calculate_equity() for 0 players (return []) and 1 player (return [1.0]). 4 new tests, 827 total passing.
Implemented equity endpoint with TDD: 9 new tests, 836 total passing. GET /games/{id}/hands/{num}/equity returns per-player equities. Frontend fetchEquity() added.
AC3 test added (empty→full sequence). 8/8 tests pass in test_empty_hand_creation_api.py, 837 total pass, pre-commit clean.

Implemented and tested: PlayerHandEntry card_1/card_2 now optional (Card | None = None), PlayerHandResponse card fields nullable, DB model + migration added, endpoint handles null cards in duplicate validation. 5 new tests + 1 updated test, 842 total passing.
Fixed: record_hand() now filters None cards in validation and uses conditional str() in persistence. 8 regression tests added, 850 total pass.
Fixed: edit_community_cards() now filters None hole cards before duplicate validation.
Fixed: edit_player_hole_cards() now filters None other-player cards before duplicate validation.
Fixed: HoleCardsUpdate.card_1/card_2 now Card | None = None; persistence uses conditional str().
Implemented and tested: currentHandId in state, per-player status field, SET_PLAYER_RESULT/SET_HAND_ID/FINISH_HAND actions. 20 tests pass (11 new).
GameSelector component implemented with TDD. 8 tests pass covering: sorted display, active/complete styling, onSelectGame/onNewGame callbacks, loading/error states.
Implemented pokerScene.js with createPokerScene(canvas, options) API. Refactored playbackView.js to use it. 7 unit tests passing, full suite green, build clean.

Implemented player tiles with status indicators: status text below name, color-coded backgrounds (white/playing, green/won, red/folded, orange/lost), 80px min-height tiles, Table tile retains checkmark. 6 new tests, 47 total passing.

Implemented per-player card collection flow: handleStartHand creates empty hand on backend, handleReviewConfirm PATCHes player cards via addPlayerToHand (new) or updateHolecards (retake), error toast on PATCH failure. 9 new tests, 56 total frontend tests passing, 0 regressions.

Implemented outcome buttons (Won/Folded/Lost). 12 new OutcomeButtons tests, 8 new DealerApp outcome flow tests, all 77 frontend tests pass. API client patchPlayerResult added. Direct outcome from PlayerGrid supported for fold-without-showing.
Implemented community card PATCH wiring: updateCommunityCards called in handleReviewConfirm before SET_COMMUNITY_CARDS dispatch, error toast on failure, 5 new tests all passing.
Implemented Finish Hand button, confirmation dialog, uncaptured player POSTing, and removed legacy handleSubmitHand. 10 new tests, 92 total passing.
Removed legacy handleSubmitHand batch path that created duplicate hands. Replaced Submit Hand button with Finish Hand in incremental flow.
Implemented DealerPreview.jsx with 9 tests, wired into DealerApp. All 101 frontend tests pass, pre-commit clean.
T-019 complete: equity badges in DealerPreview, re-fetch on community/player changes, error handling, 6 new tests (107 frontend total). Clean review.
Fixed: doFinishHand now tracks persisted players via Set state, filters them out on retry. 1 new test, 108 total, all pass.
Fixed: added None guards to 3 str(entry.card_N) sites in confirm_detection() + guarded correction loop. 3 regression tests, 853 total passing.

Implemented and tested. HandDashboard rewritten with fetchHands/createHand API integration, hand list with navigation. DealerApp updated to pass new props. All 120 frontend tests pass (12 HandDashboard + 34 DealerApp + 74 others).

Implemented and tested. Initial step changed to gameSelector, GameSelector wired with onNewGame→create and onSelectGame→dashboard, HandDashboard Back navigates to gameSelector. 5 new integration tests, 125 total tests passing.
Added integration test: clicking an existing game card in GameSelector transitions to HandDashboard. 126 frontend tests pass.

Implemented MobilePlaybackView.jsx with full-viewport canvas, bottom-drawer session picker, date-sorted game list, hand loading on selection. Route registered at #/playback-mobile. 9 tests passing, no regressions.
Implemented and tested — full dealer flow smoke test covers all 6 steps
T-021 complete: OrbitControls with touch support (pinch-zoom, single-finger orbit, double-tap reset), context menu suppression, proper dispose. 186 frontend tests pass, 0 regressions.
Implemented Preact-styled mobile UI controls: SessionScrubber, StreetScrubber, EquityRow. Wired into MobilePlaybackView with back navigation. 220 frontend tests passing.
Implemented: wired mobile playback equity display to backend fetchEquity API. Added loading spinner, error handling, re-fetch on hand change. 226 frontend tests passing.
Implemented and tested: GET /games/{game_id}/hands/{hand_number}/status endpoint with HandStatusResponse model. 9 tests pass, 894 total suite passes.
Added HANDED_BACK to ResultEnum; 6 new tests across test_result_enum.py and test_player_result_patch_api.py; 899 tests pass, 0 regressions
Implemented and tested. All three stats endpoints now exclude handed_back results. 4 new tests, 903 total passing.
Implemented and tested — PlayerApp scaffold, #/player route, Player nav link, render test. 227/227 frontend tests pass.
Implemented fetchHandStatus in client.js with 2 passing tests
Implemented player game selector with ?game= URL param support. 9 tests, all passing. 237 total frontend tests, 0 regressions.
T-012 complete: Added pending/#fef08a, joined/#bbf7d0, handed_back/#fef08a color entries to statusColors. Updated formatStatus for handed_back→'handed back'. 7 new tests, 244 frontend tests pass.

T-007 complete: Player name picker fetches game players via fetchGame, displays selectable buttons, transitions to playing step with welcome + Change Player button. 250 frontend tests pass, 0 regressions.
T-014 complete: QRCodeDisplay component renders QR code for player URL, toggle button in HandDashboard (hidden by default). 257 frontend tests pass, 903 backend tests pass.
Implemented and tested: polling loop with 3s interval, status derivation, and status-based UI rendering. 28 PlayerApp tests pass (12 new), 270 frontend tests total, 903 backend tests, 0 regressions.

T-009 complete: Camera capture flow integrated into PlayerApp. Pending status shows Capture Cards button, opens CameraCapture, shows DetectionReview, and submits via updateHolecards. Error handling with retry. 278 frontend tests pass, 0 regressions.
T-010 complete: Fold button alongside Capture Cards in pending state, confirm dialog, PATCH result with folded, error handling with retry. 285 frontend tests pass, 903 backend tests pass.
T-011 complete: Hand Back Cards button in joined state calls patchPlayerResult with handed_back. 8 new tests, 293 frontend tests pass.
Implemented dealer polling via hand status endpoint with TDD
T-015 complete: Integration tests for multi-client participation flow. 3 tests covering full lifecycle, status transitions, stats exclusion, and leaderboard exclusion of handed_back. 906 tests pass.

T-016 complete: Polling cleanup and edge case hardening. AbortController on both PlayerApp and DealerApp polling, empty hands handling, hand number change detection, network error resilience, stale poll protection for recorded players. 313 frontend + 906 backend tests pass.

Implemented: swapped Preact for React+TS deps, npm install clean, all packages verified
All 5 ACs met: strict:true, jsx:react-jsx, moduleResolution:bundler, include/exclude set, tsc --noEmit runs (TS18003 expected with no .ts files yet). Committed dd45a79.
All 4 ACs met: vite.config.ts created with @vitejs/plugin-react, all 7 proxy rules preserved, dev server port 5173 + host 0.0.0.0, npm run dev starts without build errors. 7 tests pass.

ESLint flat config with @typescript-eslint/recommended + plugin:react/recommended. CSS module type declaration at src/types/css.d.ts. npm run lint passes. Committed as 2c3e42d.

All 6 ACs met: App.tsx with HashRouter and 5 routes, NavBar.tsx with NavLink and active state, playback guard placeholder, router.js/router.test.js/main.js deleted, main.tsx renders App, index.html updated. 11 tests pass.

All 5 ACs met: dealerStore.ts exports typed Zustand store, all 12 reducer actions implemented, persist middleware with aia_dealer_state key, validateOutcomeStreets exported as typed utility, 49 tests pass (superset of old dealerState.test.js). NavBar updated to use real store.
Implemented and tested. Converted evaluator.js to evaluator.ts with Card, InternalCard, EquityResult interfaces, HandRank enum, and full type annotations. 9 tests pass. Updated all consumer imports.

Converted dealerState.js and handPayload.js to fully typed .ts files with exported types, reducer, and payload builders. Tests converted to .ts and all 53 pass. Imports updated in DealerApp.jsx and test files.
Implemented and tested: converted GameSelector and GameCreateForm to TSX with typed props, React imports, typed API client
Implemented and tested — both components converted to TSX with typed props, React Testing Library tests, 47/47 passing
Implemented and tested. Both components converted to .tsx with typed props, navigator.mediaDevices types, CardDetectionEntry interfaces, and React Testing Library tests.
Implemented and tested — both components converted to TSX with typed props, tests passing
Converted DealerPreview and QRCodeDisplay to TSX with typed props, installed @types/qrcode, all 23 tests pass

DealerApp.jsx converted to DealerApp.tsx with Zustand store replacing useReducer, manual sessionStorage removed (persist middleware handles it), all child imports reference .tsx, tests converted to .test.tsx — 44 tests pass, 240 dealer tests pass, 0 regressions

LandingPage.jsx converted to LandingPage.tsx with strict TypeScript, Zustand store integration replacing sessionStorage reads, typed handlers/styles, test file created with 11 passing tests, wired into App.tsx router

RTL infra set up: installed @testing-library/user-event, created test setup file with jest-dom matchers, configured setupFiles in vite.config.ts, wrote smoke test verifying render + jest-dom + userEvent. All 349 tests pass, no regressions.

Converted 4 vanilla DOM components to React TSX: SessionForm, PlayerManagement, HandRecordForm, HandEditForm. Created shared cardUtils.ts. 38 new tests (5 test files), zero regressions. All TS strict mode, no pre-commit issues.
Converted 5 vanilla DOM components to React TSX with typed props: SessionScrubber, StreetScrubber, StatsSidebar, ResultOverlay, EquityOverlay. 41 tests passing, zero regressions.

Converted playbackView.js to PlaybackView.tsx and MobilePlaybackView.jsx to MobilePlaybackView.tsx. Three.js scene lifecycle managed with useRef+useEffect with cleanup. Canvas via useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>. Imports TSX SessionScrubber, StreetScrubber, EquityOverlay components. All state, refs, and Three.js integration points typed. Tests converted to React Testing Library. Old .js/.jsx files removed. 29 tests pass, 0 regressions.
Converted dataView.js to DataView.tsx with full React/TypeScript conversion, typed API responses, 13 passing tests, wired into App.tsx router
All 4 TSX components converted: PlayerApp, EquityRow, SessionScrubber, StreetScrubber. 553 tests pass.

Converted pokerScene.js and tableGeometry.js to TypeScript with typed signatures. Installed @types/three. createPokerScene returns PokerSceneResult interface. Updated all imports (8 files). 565 tests pass, 12 new tests for tableGeometry.

All 5 visual modules converted to TypeScript with explicit Three.js types. pokerScene.test.js converted to .ts. 40 new unit tests added (605 total, 0 failures). No any types for Three.js objects. Old .js files deleted. Imports updated in pokerScene.ts.

Migrated all component tests to RTL. Converted GameSelectorIntegration.test.jsx to .tsx with RTL render. Converted 5 additional .tsx test files (EquityRow, StreetScrubber, SessionScrubber, PlayerApp, DealerApp) from createRoot to RTL render/cleanup. Deleted old .jsx file. All 605 tests pass across 46 files. No legacy patterns remain.

Implemented and tested: updated frontend/Dockerfile with npm run build for TS verification, fixed docker-compose.yml volume mounts (vite.config.js -> vite.config.ts, added tsconfig.json). 8 new tests, 967 total passed.
All JS/JSX removed. Zero Preact refs. 605+967 tests pass. Build clean. Branch ready for PR.

All 28 tasks complete. Full migration from JS+Preact to TS(strict)+React. 605 frontend tests, 967 backend tests pass. Vite build clean (33 modules). Zero JS/JSX/Preact remain. Branch frontend-react-ts-006 ready for PR.

PlayerHandAction model, relationship, migration, and 22 tests implemented
Implemented and tested — added sb_player_id and bb_player_id nullable FK columns to Hand model with Alembic migration. 10 new tests, 1002 total passing.
Implemented and tested: added 5 blind columns to GameSession model with defaults, Alembic migration with server_default, 16 new tests all passing, full suite 1018 passed

GET and PATCH /games/{game_id}/blinds implemented with TDD. 9 new tests, 1058 total passing. All ACs satisfied.
Implemented POST /games/{game_id}/hands/{hand_number}/players/{player_name}/actions endpoint with full TDD coverage. 18 tests pass, 1076 total suite passes.
Implemented PATCH /games/{game_id}/players/{player_name}/status endpoint with TDD. 8 tests in test_toggle_player_status_api.py, full suite 1084 passed.
POST /games/{game_id}/players implemented and tested. 7 new tests, 1091 total passing. Pre-commit clean.
Implemented POST /games/{game_id}/hands/start with SB/BB rotation. 23 new tests, 1114 total passing. HandResponse updated with sb_player_name/bb_player_name fields.

Fixed: replaced all 5 inline HandResponse constructions in list_hands, get_hand, edit_community_cards, record_hand, and record_hand_results with _build_hand_response(hand, db). 5 new tests added, 1119 total passing.

Added PlayerName annotated type with strip_whitespace=True and min_length=1. Applied to AddPlayerToGameRequest, GameSessionCreate, PlayerHandEntry, PlayerResultEntry, ConfirmPlayerEntry. 10 new tests, 1129 total passing.
Fixed blind timer resume bug. Added blind_timer_remaining_seconds column, Alembic migration, and corrected pause/resume logic. 3 new tests, 1 updated test, 1132 total passing.

Added 6 typed API client functions (togglePlayerStatus, addPlayerToGame, startHand, recordPlayerAction, fetchBlinds, updateBlinds) with corresponding TypeScript types and 10 tests. No rebuy/fetchHandActions endpoints exist in backend so those were skipped.
Implemented and tested: PlayerInfo model added, GameSessionResponse augmented with players field, all 4 endpoints updated, 12 new tests, 1144 total pass
Implemented fold auto-sets result. 7 new tests, all 1151 tests pass.
Implemented GET /games/{game_id}/hands/{hand_number}/actions with TDD. 6 tests added, all 1157 pass.
Implemented and tested: sequential seat assignment on POST /games and POST /games/{id}/players, PlayerInfo includes seat_number, 4 new tests, full suite 1161 passed

Implemented and tested: HandState auto-created on hand start, GET state endpoint, turn-order enforcement with 409, seat advancement, phase auto-advancement, community card gating, force bypass. 19 new tests, 1180 total passing.
Implemented buy-in capture on POST /games and POST /games/{id}/players. 7 new tests, 1187 total passing. All pre-commit hooks pass.
Implemented POST/GET rebuy endpoints with TDD. 10 new tests, 1197 total passing. All ACs met.
Added Field(gt=0) to RebuyCreate.amount. 2 new tests (negative and zero amount → 422). 1199 passed, 0 failed.
Implemented and tested: RequestIdMiddleware adds X-Request-Id (UUID4) and X-Response-Time-Ms headers to every response. 7 new tests, full suite 1206 passed.

Implemented and tested. TableView component renders Three.js poker scene in full-viewport canvas with touch-enabled orbit controls, player's own hole cards face-up (others face-down), community cards, Back to Hand navigation, and camera centered on player seat. Fixed bounded-retry init pattern and test canvas dimension mocking. All 9 TableView tests + 631 full suite tests pass. Build clean.

Removed dealer-centric mode toggle and all code paths. GameMode type, SET_GAME_MODE action, gameMode state, and all conditional branches removed from dealerStore, dealerState, DealerApp, GameCreateForm, HandDashboard, and PlayerGrid. Participation mode is now the only code path. Build passes with zero TS errors, 621/621 tests pass.
Deleted handPayload.ts, handPayload.test.ts, HandRecordForm.tsx, HandRecordForm.test.tsx. Build clean (0 TS errors). 607 tests pass, 0 fail.

All 5 ACs satisfied. DealerApp restructured to 4-step flow (gameSelector → dashboard → activeHand → review). QR codes step removed (QR toggle already in dashboard). Detection review and outcome now render as overlays within activeHand. Hand review step shows summary before returning to dashboard. Mobile-first bottom nav bar added. 614 FE tests pass (7 new), build clean.
Removed review from restoreState normalization guard in dealerStore.ts and dealerState.ts. Updated tests to assert review step is preserved. 614 FE tests pass, build clean.

Start Hand button implemented on HandDashboard. Uses startHand(gameId) API, shows loading state, displays error on failure. 4 new tests + 22 existing tests all passing. 617 total frontend tests green.
Active Hand Dashboard implemented with blind info bar, community board (5 slots), player tiles with statusColors, street buttons, Showdown button, and polling. 634 FE tests pass (17 new).

Incremental community card capture verified with 14 new tests covering turn/river capture→confirm→PATCH flow, incremental enabling, board slot updates, error handling, and full flop→turn→river integration. All 648 FE tests pass.

Showdown trigger + auto-detection implemented and tested. 16 unit tests for showdownHelpers, 4 enable/disable tests in ActiveHandDashboard, 8 integration tests in DealerApp. 676 FE tests pass, 0 regressions.
ReviewScreen component implemented with full TDD. 21 new component tests + 67 DealerApp tests pass. 697 total FE tests pass. All 6 ACs met.
Fixed partial save bug: replaced Promise.all with Promise.allSettled, added dirty tracking for results, retry skips succeeded mutations

End-hand flow implemented with terminal state check. Finish Hand button gated until all players have won/lost/folded. Auto-fold for null-card+null-result players. Confirmation dialog with outcome summary. 715 FE tests pass, 1206 BE tests pass, 0 regressions.
Dealer flow integration test implemented and passing. 1207/1207 tests pass, 0 regressions. All 6 ACs covered.
Added three assertions: Charlie excluded from equity, exactly 2 equity entries, equity sums to ~1.0. All 1207 tests pass.
Implemented showdown card reveals. 5 ACs satisfied: isShowdown() detection, 300ms flip animation, winner glow, FOLD sprite, trigger on finalized hand. 729 tests pass, 0 regressions.

Implemented and tested: GamePlayerManagement component with 11 tests. Lists players with active/inactive status, toggle switches call togglePlayerStatus(), Add Player calls addPlayerToGame(), error states shown inline. Integrated into HandDashboard on dashboard step. All 740 frontend tests pass, 0 regressions.
Implemented ChipPicker component with TDD. 16 tests all passing, no regressions in full suite (756/756).
Added floating-point precision regression test to ChipPicker.test.tsx — clicks $0.10 x3, confirms, asserts onConfirm(0.3). All 757 tests pass.

PlayerActionButtons component implemented with full TDD. 20 new tests covering all 7 ACs: 5 action buttons (fold/check/call/bet/raise), ChipPicker integration for bet/raise, disabled-after-acting, re-enable on new community cards, street auto-determination from community card count. Integrated into PlayerApp for joined status. 777 tests passing, 0 regressions.
Fixed: added setChipAction(null) in catch block to dismiss ChipPicker on API failure. Test added and full suite passes (778/778).
Player flow integration test implemented and passing. 1208/1208 tests pass.
Implemented range slider with 48px thumb on SessionScrubber. All 780 frontend tests pass.

ETag support added to GET /games/{id}/hands/{num}/status. Response includes ETag header (MD5 hash of response body). If-None-Match returns 304 when matching. 6 new tests, 1214 total passing. 0 regressions.
Structured request logging added to RequestIdMiddleware. 9 new tests, 1223 total passing.
Fixed: added try/except to middleware for unhandled exceptions, replaced flaky 5xx test with deterministic test routes

Split-screen layout implemented. matchMedia hook toggles split (>=600px) vs stacked (<600px). Board+streets and player tiles in separate panels with independent scroll. Blind bar sticky. 6 new tests, 786 FE tests pass, 0 regressions.

Implemented image preview step in CameraCapture: after capture shows photo with Use Photo/Retake buttons, preview from local blob URL (no backend call), resolution + file size info, mobile-first 48px buttons. 13 tests pass (7 new), 793 total suite green.

Implemented top-N OCR alternatives in DetectionReview. TDD: 6 new tests + 11 existing pass. Alternatives panel with confidence %, min 48px touch targets, horizontal scroll, All Cards fallback to CardPicker, direct CardPicker fallback when no alternatives.

Implemented seat-snap camera view: seatCamera.ts with computeSeatCameraPosition/animateCameraToSeat/getDefaultCameraPosition, integrated into TableView.tsx with clickable seat labels, Reset View button, and player-default animation. 28 tests pass (10 seatCamera + 18 TableView), full suite 815/815 green.

Integrated SessionScrubber into TableView. Range slider min=1 max=total hands, defaults to latest, updates 3D scene on change, label shows Hand X/Y, 48px touch-friendly thumb. 6 new tests, 822 total pass, 0 regressions.

All 5 ACs implemented and tested. Backend: calculate_player_equity + ?player= query param on equity endpoint. Frontend: equity overlay on TableView with toggle, auto-fetch on hand change. 9 backend + 7 frontend new tests pass, 1233 backend + 829 frontend total pass, 0 regressions.
BlindPositionDisplay component created with 9 unit tests. Integrated into TableView with 5 integration tests. All 843 frontend tests pass. ACs 1-5 met.
Implemented session pinning with sessionStorage. Store gameId+playerName on selection, restore on mount if game active, clear on invalid/leave. 7 tests added, all 851 pass.

All 5 ACs met. QR simplified to single game URL (/player?game=<id>), no playerName prop, single prominent QR on dashboard with show/hide toggle, updates on game change. 849 FE tests pass, 0 regressions.

BlindTimer component implemented with TDD. 15 tests covering: blind level display, countdown timer, pause/resume via updateBlinds(), advance prompt at 0, cleanup on unmount. All 864 frontend tests pass, 0 regressions.
Polling optimization: usePolling hook with AbortController, dealer 3s, player 5s with ETag/304, viz 10s, reconnection indicator. 873 tests pass.
Implemented and tested: useHandPolling hook with 10s polling, auto-advance, new-hand banner, community card updates, AbortController cleanup. 53 tests pass (11 hook + 42 component).

Epic complete. All 49 tasks delivered: 8 Alembic migrations, 15 backend endpoints, 32 frontend features/components, 5 bugs filed and fixed, 3 integration tests. Quality gates: ruff clean, 1233 BE tests, 889 FE tests, TS build zero errors, ESLint zero errors.
Implemented seat assignment PATCH endpoint and conflict checking on add_player_to_game. 12 new tests, all 1263 tests pass.

Implemented betting state machine: auto-post blinds, legal actions, turn enforcement (403), pot tracking, side pots, fold-to-one, street completion with bet equalization, Alembic migration. 31 new tests + 1263 existing passing.
Fixed: added ge=0 constraint to PlayerActionCreate.amount. Regression test confirms negative amounts return 422. Full suite 1295 passed.

Fixed: side pot responses now expose eligible_players (names) instead of eligible_player_ids (ints). Added _resolve_side_pot_names helper in routes/hands.py, applied in both HandResponse and HandStatusResponse paths. 3 new regression tests, 1298 total passing.
Fixed: empty-IDs fallback now returns eligible_players:[] instead of leaking raw dicts. 4 new tests, 1302 total passing.

Added optional is_all_in field to PlayerActionCreate. Action handler now honors explicit flag for any action type (bet/raise/call), with call-for-less auto-detection preserved as fallback. 6 new tests, 1308 total passing.

Implemented and tested: canvas bounds (flex layout + ResizeObserver), scrubber responsiveness (onInput + rAF deferred scene updates), camera defaults (Y=18 Z=6, SEAT_HEIGHT=8, SEAT_BEHIND=1.6, minDistance=8, maxDistance=30). 12 new tests, 898 total passing.
Fixed: pokerScene.ts now imports DEFAULT_OVERHEAD_POSITION from seatCamera.ts instead of hardcoding (0,8,5). Also fixed table.ts and pokerScene.js. New test added, 899 tests passing.
Fixed table.ts to import DEFAULT_OVERHEAD_POSITION from seatCamera.ts instead of hardcoding (0,18,6). Test updated to assert against the constant. 899 tests passing.
Fixed stale mock values in TableView.test.tsx: updated DEFAULT_OVERHEAD_POSITION from (0,14,3) to (0,18,6) in 3 locations. 42 TableView tests + 19 scene tests passing.
Implemented TableView3D component and HandDashboard toggle. All 911 tests pass, 38 new tests added.

Added externalResize option to createPokerScene. When true, skips internal window resize listener. TableView3D passes externalResize:true since it manages resizing via ResizeObserver. 6 new tests, 917 total passing, 0 regressions.

Implemented all 4 components: SeatPicker (10-seat oval), PlayerApp seat step, GamePlayerManagement seat display/reassign, ActiveHandDashboard bet verification. 949 frontend tests pass (0 failures). All 7 AC satisfied.
Fixed: handleConfirmAction now opens override form for bet/raise instead of auto-submitting with amountToCall. 4 new tests, 953 frontend tests passing.

Removed BlindPositionDisplay HUD from TableView: deleted import, JSX render block, sbPlayerName/bbPlayerName state, and blindDisplayContainer style. Removed 5 related tests from TableView.test.tsx. All 952 frontend tests pass.
Removed Showdown button, updated canFinish logic, added auto-winner in doFinishHand, updated tests
Implemented and tested: winning hand descriptions shown in ReviewScreen via fetchEquity call on mount
Implemented player totals in HandDashboard with rebuy gating and running total in PlayerApp. All 959 frontend tests pass.
Fixed: rebuy button now disabled when buy_in is null/0, added rebuyError state with inline error display on failure, error clears on next successful rebuy. 4 new tests added.

Changed blindBarSticky flexDirection to column and alignItems to center, removing justifyContent space-between. Blind amounts now display on one line with SB/BB player names on a separate line below. All 963 frontend tests pass.

Moved 3D view toggle from HandDashboard to ActiveHandDashboard. Removed viewMode state, toggle button, TableView3D import and conditional rendering from HandDashboard. Added them to ActiveHandDashboard with on-demand fetchHands when toggling to 3D. All 963 frontend tests pass.
Implemented and tested: added Reset button to BlindTimer, integrated BlindTimer into ActiveHandDashboard replacing static blind bar
All 8 child tasks completed: HUD fix, showdown removal, winning hand display, player totals, rebuy gating+fix, blind bar layout, 3D view move, timer reset.
Fold now sets outcome_street on player_hand. Fold-to-one winner also gets outcome_street. 3 tests added.
Implemented and tested: showdown sets current_seat=None so no player is prompted to act

Created player_schemas.py with 10 player-related classes extracted from game_schemas.py. Updated game_schemas.py to import PlayerInfo from player_schemas. Updated app_models.py to re-export from player_schemas for backward compatibility. All 1386 tests pass, 21 new split-verification tests added.

Test passes with current working-tree changes. All 1386 tests pass, no regressions. The only changes to test_river_showdown_transition.py are cosmetic f-string quote style fixes (double→single quotes) from ruff formatting. The hands.py changes (caching, _touch_hand_state, signature changes) do not break the test. No fix was needed — the bug was already resolved by the time this task was investigated.
Migrated all 7 route files and 7 test files from pydantic_models.app_models to domain-specific modules. 1386 tests pass, all modified files lint-clean.
Implemented and tested: created queries.py with 4 get-or-404 helpers, replaced 40+ inline patterns across 5 route files, 9 new unit tests, all 1395 tests pass

Added cascade='all, delete-orphan' to GameSession→Hand, Hand→PlayerHand, PlayerHand→PlayerHandAction, Hand→HandState relationships. Removed manual cascade delete code from delete_game() and delete_hand() routes. 6 new tests pass, full suite 1401 passed.
Implemented: Rebuy model player_name→player_id FK. Updated model, Pydantic schemas, routes, tests. Created Alembic migration with data migration support.
Extracted shared evaluator into services/evaluator.py; equity.py and hand_ranking.py now import from it. 25 new tests, 1428 total pass, zero regressions.
Extracted 8 hand-state functions from routes/hands.py into services/hand_state.py. 33 new unit tests, 1461 total passing.

Implemented GET /stats/games/{game_id}/highlights endpoint with 3 highlight types (most_action, river_showdown, streak_start). 8 tests passing.
Implemented TanStack Query setup + analytics API hooks. All 6 hooks created, typed, tested (14 tests), full suite passes (1028 tests).

Implemented PlayerSelector component with type-ahead filtering, onSelect callback, controlled value prop, and mobile-friendly styling. 11 tests passing.
Implemented GameListPage and GameRecapPage with routes, loading skeletons, and 9 passing tests
Fixed isError to check all four query error states (statsQuery, handsQuery, awardsQuery, highlightsQuery). Added 3 new test cases covering each non-stats query failure.

Implemented PlayerSummaryCards component with scrollable row, winner highlighting (trophy + gold border), P&L formatting, and full test coverage (11 component tests + 3 integration tests). All 1095 tests pass.
Implemented HandTimeline component with TDD. 16 tests passing, full suite (1111 tests) green.
Implemented KeyMomentsSection component with type icons, click-to-scroll, and empty-state hiding. All 1123 frontend tests pass.
Implemented session awards banner: AwardCard components with player profile links, max 3, hidden when empty. 16 tests pass.
Implemented PlayerProfilePage with TDD: 8 passing tests, route registered, all 1135 frontend tests pass
Implemented HeadToHeadPage with two PlayerSelectors, swap button, head-to-head data fetching, localStorage recent pairs, and placeholder. 9 tests pass, full suite green (1144/1144).

Implemented OutcomeDonutCharts component with outcome distribution and street reach donut charts. Integrated into PlayerProfilePage. 9 tests added, all 1161 tests pass.
Implemented SessionHistoryTable component with sortable columns, pagination, row navigation, and mobile sticky first column. Integrated into PlayerProfilePage. 18 tests passing.
Implemented ShowdownRecord and FoldBehaviorChart components, integrated into HeadToHeadPage, all 11 new tests pass
Implemented StreetRivalryChart component with stacked bar chart, custom tooltip, and responsive layout. Integrated into HeadToHeadPage. 8 new tests pass, full suite green (1198/1198).
